zh.lifeSummary: 當William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar於1304年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安帕斯海亞德時，他的父親John Crichton27歲，母親Isabel Leslie24歲。他和Isabel de Ros至少有1個兒子。他去世於1382年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾帕斯海亞德享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar was born in 1304, in Pathhead, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, John Crichton, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Leslie, was 24. He had at least 1 son with Isabel de Ros. He died in 1382, in Pathhead, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar est né en 1304, à Pathhead, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, John Crichton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Leslie, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Isabel de Ros. Il est décédé en 1382, à Pathhead, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar(이)가 1304년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 패스헤드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Crichton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Leslie(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Isabel de Ros(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1382년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 패스헤드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.
